title: AISC 360-22 Steel Member Design
description: Design standard and custom steel members in accordance with AISC 360-22.

design_method.description: Design Method. Symbol: Method. Choose between Load and Resistance Factor Design (LFRD) and Allowable Strength Design (ASD).

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

steel_grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit section yield and tensile strength.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: in. Total height (or diameter) of section.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: in. Total width of section.

t_f_input.description: tf. Symbol: t_f. Units: in. Flange thickness, or top/btm wall thickness (RHS/SHS) or CHS thickness.

t_w_input.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: in. Web thickness, or side wall thickness (RHS/SHS).

r_input.description: r. Symbol: r. Units: in. Fillet radius.

f_y.description: Fy. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: ksi. Section yield strength.

f_u.description: Fu. Symbol: F_{u}. Units: ksi. Section tensile strength.

restraint.description: Torsional Restraint. Symbol: Restraint. Select segment torsional restraint condition. Selecting Continuous Restraint will skip lateral-torsional and flexural-torsional buckling checks.

L_z_flexure_input.description: Lb. Symbol: L_{b}. Units: ft. Unbraced length between compression flange restraint or twist restraints.

Cb_input.description: Cb. Symbol: C_{b}. Lateral-torsional buckling modification factor.

L_z_comp_input.description: Lz. Symbol: L_{z}. Units: ft. Unbraced length for flexural buckling about the principal Z-axis.

L_y_comp_input.description: Ly. Symbol: L_{y}. Units: ft. Unbraced length for flexural buckling about the principal Y-axis.

ke_z_input.description: Kz. Symbol: K_{z}. Effective length factor for flexural buckling about the principal Z-axis.

ke_y_input.description: Ky. Symbol: K_{y}. Effective length factor for flexural buckling about the principal Y-axis.

M_fz_input.description: Mrz. Symbol: M_{rz}. Units: kip-ft. Required flexural strength for bending about the major (Z) axis. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

M_fy_input.description: Mry. Symbol: M_{ry}. Units: kip-ft. Required flexural strength for bending about the minor (Y) Axis. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

V_fy_input.description: Vry. Symbol: V_{ry}. Units: kip. Required shear strength in major (Y) axis direction.

V_fz_input.description: Vrz. Symbol: V_{rz}. Units: kip. Required shear strength in minor (Z) axis direction.

N_f_input.description: Pr. Symbol: P_{r}. Units: kip. Required axial strength. Positive value represents compression.

load_axes.description: Applied Loading Axes. Symbol: Load\;Axes. Select which axis system design loads are applied. Loads will be converted between principal or geometric axis directions where required.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
